name: unclosed-vec
expect: !{:origin :qlang/parse :kind :parse-error :thrown :ParseError :message "Expected \"!{\", \"!|\", \"#{\", \"(\", \"*\", \",\", \"-\", \".\", \"/\", \":\", \">>\", \"[\", \"\\\"\", \"]\", \"false\", \"nil\", \"true\", \"{\", \"|\", \"|~\", \"|~|\", \"|~~\", \"|~~|\", [ \\t\\n\\r], [0-9], or [@_a-zA-Z] but end of input found." :location {:start {:offset 6 :line 1 :column 7} :end {:offset 6 :line 1 :column 7}}}

name: unclosed-map
expect: !{:origin :qlang/parse :kind :parse-error :thrown :ParseError :message "Expected \"!|\", \"*\", \",\", \".\", \":\", \">>\", \"|\", \"|~\", \"|~|\", \"|~~\", \"|~~|\", \"}\", [ \\t\\n\\r], or [0-9] but end of input found." :location {:start {:offset 5 :line 1 :column 6} :end {:offset 5 :line 1 :column 6}}}

name: unclosed-set
expect: !{:origin :qlang/parse :kind :parse-error :thrown :ParseError :message "Expected \"!{\", \"!|\", \"#{\", \"(\", \"*\", \",\", \"-\", \"/\", \":\", \">>\", \"[\", \"\\\"\", \"false\", \"nil\", \"true\", \"{\", \"|\", \"|~\", \"|~|\", \"|~~\", \"|~~|\", \"}\", [ \\t\\n\\r], [0-9], [@_a-zA-Z], or [a-zA-Z0-9_\\-] but end of input found." :location {:start {:offset 4 :line 1 :column 5} :end {:offset 4 :line 1 :column 5}}}

name: unclosed-paren
expect: !{:origin :qlang/parse :kind :parse-error :thrown :ParseError :message "Expected \"!|\", \")\", \"*\", \">>\", \"|\", \"|~\", \"|~|\", \"|~~\", \"|~~|\", or [ \\t\\n\\r] but end of input found." :location {:start {:offset 11 :line 1 :column 12} :end {:offset 11 :line 1 :column 12}}}

name: unclosed-string
expect: !{:origin :qlang/parse :kind :parse-error :thrown :ParseError :message "Expected \"\\\"\", \"\\\\\", or any character but end of input found." :location {:start {:offset 6 :line 1 :column 7} :end {:offset 6 :line 1 :column 7}}}

name: trailing-pipe
expect: !{:origin :qlang/parse :kind :parse-error :thrown :ParseError :message "Expected \"!{\", \"#{\", \"(\", \"-\", \"/\", \":\", \"[\", \"\\\"\", \"false\", \"nil\", \"true\", \"{\", \"|~~\", \"|~~|\", [ \\t\\n\\r], [0-9], or [@_a-zA-Z] but end of input found." :location {:start {:offset 9 :line 1 :column 10} :end {:offset 9 :line 1 :column 10}}}

name: dangling-distribute
expect: !{:origin :qlang/parse :kind :parse-error :thrown :ParseError :message "Expected \"!{\", \"#{\", \"(\", \"-\", \"/\", \":\", \"[\", \"\\\"\", \"false\", \"nil\", \"true\", \"{\", \"|~~\", \"|~~|\", [ \\t\\n\\r], [0-9], or [@_a-zA-Z] but end of input found." :location {:start {:offset 9 :line 1 :column 10} :end {:offset 9 :line 1 :column 10}}}

name: dangling-projection-slash
expect: !{:origin :qlang/parse :kind :parse-error :thrown :ParseError :message "Expected \":\", \"\\\"\", or [@_a-zA-Z] but end of input found." :location {:start {:offset 1 :line 1 :column 2} :end {:offset 1 :line 1 :column 2}}}

name: empty-keyword
expect: !{:origin :qlang/parse :kind :parse-error :thrown :ParseError :message "Expected \"\\\"\" or [@_a-zA-Z] but end of input found." :location {:start {:offset 1 :line 1 :column 2} :end {:offset 1 :line 1 :column 2}}}

name: trailing-merge
expect: !{:origin :qlang/parse :kind :parse-error :thrown :ParseError :message "Expected \"!{\", \"#{\", \"(\", \"-\", \"/\", \":\", \"[\", \"\\\"\", \"false\", \"nil\", \"true\", \"{\", \"|~~\", \"|~~|\", [ \\t\\n\\r], [0-9], or [@_a-zA-Z] but end of input found." :location {:start {:offset 8 :line 1 :column 9} :end {:offset 8 :line 1 :column 9}}}
